key_insights.bc_cliff: Success rate drops from 80% (B) to 62% (C) — the practical boundary of usability
key_insights.slack_dominance: 82/188 recipes (43.6%) use Slack as output layer
key_insights.gotchas_resolved: Agent Wisdom fill rate improved 24.7% → 61.4% after 188/188 gotchas injection (avg success +4.4pt to 77.3%)
key_insights.mcp_first_paradox: AAA services have lower HTTP API reachability (74%) because they're MCP-first (npx CLI)
key_insights.jp_payment_gap: Japanese payment MCPs (stripe-jp, linepay, paidy) are weakest chains at 35% success

slack.insight: stdout of agent economy, 91% success, Block Kit is the only trap

github.insight: Gold standard — GraphQL + REST dual API, official MCP server, best docs

stripe-global.insight: Best API docs in ecosystem, idempotent keys, but MCP server is community-only

notion.insight: Database query API is powerful agent datastore, 3 req/sec rate limit is bottleneck

freee.insight: OAuth 24h expiry is #1 failure mode across all agent types

kintone.insight: Discoverability problem — de facto leader not found in agent search

zendesk.insight: Mature API with incremental export, rate limits need agent-tier options

shopify-jp.insight: GraphQL Admin API powerful but cost-based throttling returns 200 not 429

cross_agent_insights.claude_vs_gpt: Claude agents favor MCP-native paths; GPT agents rely more on OpenAPI specs and function calling
cross_agent_insights.gemini_angle: Gemini agents show Google Workspace preference, rate freee/SmartHR lower due to limited ecosystem support
cross_agent_insights.consensus: All three agent types agree: auth friction (OAuth token expiry) is the #1 cross-service pain point
